title: Married Life | #shorts
full_text: shal why are you eating an egg in your th food like I don't understand your obsession with putting an egg in everything but it has protein it's a good thing to eat what's the problem with an egg who eats egg with th food and rice like this everyone that wants to stay hey you know you know where this came from right you have issues with eggs it's because your mom made you drink raw eggs as a child who does that that is so gross you know who else ate raw eggs Rocky and Rocky one before he became Rocky he would eat raw eggs and then go for a r okay so Rocky since you are the Indian Rocky can you explain to me why after eating on drinking all these raw eggs in your life when I ask you to move furniture around the house your back hurts
